title: Strait of Hormuz Naval Patrol Spike
summary: Satellite synthetic aperture radar (SAR) detected 14 non-commercial naval vessels entering maritime corridor Alpha.

title: Malacca Strait Weather Anomaly
summary: Tropical storm warnings disrupting 22 crude tankers en route to Tokyo and Shanghai refineries.

title: Pipeline Cyber Threat Signal
summary: Anomalous SCADA network packet signatures identified at pressure control sub-station B.

title: Strategic Reserve Injection Complete
summary: Completed scheduled transfer of 4.2M barrels into Strategic Petroleum Reserve Cavern 3.
